title: Logic Bakery (Create and Farmers delight compat)
description: Making a better and logic compatibility between Create and Farmer's delight for bakery
body:
## What this datapack do:
- Replace [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)'s dough for all his craft by [Farmer's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)'s wheat dough (Create's dough is useless and uncraftable)
- Replace wheat by flour or dough for the food using it
- Tweak some food crafts (both vanilla and modded)

## Other compatible mods (for now):
- [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition)
- [Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin)
- [Ender's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight)



**Mod version is planned so be patient please**
